Explanation: Using selectFrom(NEW_TABLE) fetches all columns from the NEW_TABLE table, which can retrieve unnecessary data and impact performance. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed for this operation.

Code fragment: public static final TableField<NewTableRecord, Integer> ID = createField(DSL.name("id"), SQLDataType.INTEGER.nullable(false), NEW_TABLE, "");
